best_bet.reason: You'll get the warmest water of the three counties at 84°F, glassy conditions under light winds, and a moderate to strong longshore current that stacks shells along the shoreline, making tomorrow ideal for both swimming and beachcombing.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
